title: Red Ribbon City Cultural Tourism Poster AI
sourceTitle: Red Ribbon City Cultural Tourism Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 elegant Chinese New Year city-promotion poster for Guangzhou, using an S-shaped red silk ribbon that transforms into a mountain-water city river. Subject: miniature figure in traditional Lingnan clothing waving a long red silk ribbon anchors the lower-right foreground, waving a long red silk ribbon that flows upward into a double-exposure hand-painted city landscape containing Canton Tower, Pearl River, Chen Clan Ancestral Hall, Shamian Island, Baiyun Mountain, Yongqing Fang, Guangzhou Opera House. Scene: Pure white textured background with large refined negative space, festive but elegant New Year atmosphere, red silk movement, cloud mist, Chinese landscape river, modern city landmarks, and delicate regional craft details. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 composition: miniature cultural figure in the lower right, red ribbon sweeping in an S curve toward the upper left, ribbon morphing into a river-and-mountain city panorama, large white space kept fresh, and poster typography placed clearly in the lower left. Signature Elements: S-shaped red silk ribbon, Guangzhou, miniature figure in traditional Lingnan clothing waving a long red silk ribbon, Canton Tower, Pearl River, Chen Clan Ancestral Hall, Shamian Island, Baiyun Mountain, Yongqing Fang, Guangzhou Opera House, mountain-water river transformation, cloud mist, large white background, Guochao hand-painted detail, lower-left SPRING 2026, and slogan 千年商都，湾区核心. Style: High-end Guochao city cultural-promotion poster with double exposure, hand-painted urban landscape, elegant festive restraint, complex fine detail inside the ribbon river, refined tourism-poster polish, and graceful spring celebration energy. Color Palette: Dominant pure white textured paper, vivid ceremonial red silk, rich but controlled city-landscape colors, soft mist whites, ink greens, warm gold accents, and crisp dark typography. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: SPRING 2026 and 千年商都，湾区核心 appear as clear elegant poster text in the lower-left layout, with optional vertical Chinese slogan treatment and complete readable strokes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 elegant Chinese New Year city-promotion poster for Chengdu, using an S-shaped red silk ribbon that transforms into a mountain-water city river. Subject: miniature figure in modern Sichuan opera-inspired clothing waving a long red silk ribbon anchors the lower-right foreground, waving a long red silk ribbon that flows upward into a double-exposure hand-painted city landscape containing Tianfu Twin Towers, Jinli street, Dujiangyan, Qingcheng Mountain, Anshun Bridge, bamboo groves, night teahouse lights. Scene: Pure white textured background with large refined negative space, festive but elegant New Year atmosphere, red silk movement, cloud mist, Chinese landscape river, modern city landmarks, and delicate regional craft details. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 composition: miniature cultural figure in the lower right, red ribbon sweeping in an S curve toward the upper left, ribbon morphing into a river-and-mountain city panorama, large white space kept fresh, and poster typography placed clearly in the lower left. Signature Elements: S-shaped red silk ribbon, Chengdu, miniature figure in modern Sichuan opera-inspired clothing waving a long red silk ribbon, Tianfu Twin Towers, Jinli street, Dujiangyan, Qingcheng Mountain, Anshun Bridge, bamboo groves, night teahouse lights, mountain-water river transformation, cloud mist, large white background, Guochao hand-painted detail, lower-left SPRING 2026, and slogan 烟火天府，公园之城. Style: High-end Guochao city cultural-promotion poster with double exposure, hand-painted urban landscape, elegant festive restraint, complex fine detail inside the ribbon river, refined tourism-poster polish, and graceful spring celebration energy. Color Palette: Dominant pure white textured paper, vivid ceremonial red silk, rich but controlled city-landscape colors, soft mist whites, ink greens, warm gold accents, and crisp dark typography. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: SPRING 2026 and 烟火天府，公园之城 appear as clear elegant poster text in the lower-left layout, with optional vertical Chinese slogan treatment and complete readable strokes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Subject: miniature figure in traditional Lingnan clothing waving a long red silk ribbon anchors the lower-right foreground, waving a long red silk ribbon that flows upward into a double-exposure hand-painted city landscape containing Canton Tower, Pearl River, Chen Clan Ancestral Hall, Shamian Island, Baiyun Mountain, Yongqing Fang, Guangzhou Opera House. Scene: Pure white textured background with large refined negative space, festive but elegant New Year atmosphere, red silk movement, cloud mist, Chinese landscape river, modern city landmarks, and delicate regional craft details. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 composition: miniature cultural figure in the lower right, red ribbon sweeping in an S curve toward the upper left, ribbon morphing into a river-and-mountain city panorama, large white space kept fresh, and poster typography placed clearly in the lower left. Signature Elements: S-shaped red silk ribbon, Guangzhou, miniature figure in traditional Lingnan clothing waving a long red silk ribbon, Canton Tower, Pearl River, Chen Clan Ancestral Hall, Shamian Island, Baiyun Mountain, Yongqing Fang, Guangzhou Opera House, mountain-water river transformation, cloud mist, large white background, Guochao hand-painted detail, lower-left SPRING 2026, and slogan 千年商都，湾区核心. Style: High-end Guochao city cultural-promotion poster with double exposure, hand-painted urban landscape, elegant festive restraint, complex fine detail inside the ribbon river, refined tourism-poster polish, and graceful spring celebration energy. Color Palette: Dominant pure white textured paper, vivid ceremonial red silk, rich but controlled city-landscape colors, soft mist whites, ink greens, warm gold accents, and crisp dark typography. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: SPRING 2026 and 千年商都，湾区核心 appear as clear elegant poster text in the lower-left layout, with optional vertical Chinese slogan treatment and complete readable strokes. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
